majorChanges.description: CRITICAL: Removed duplicated passage (~170 words). Scene 2 and Scene 3 contained near-identical Oathbrand/brand-revelation exchange with verbatim hovering-hand gesture. Removed duplicate from Scene 3, replaced with bridge advancing conversation to practical next question.

MAJOR: Trimmed intel briefing that interrupted dark night of the soul (-564 words). Cut recognition protocol history, compressed Ashborne recap, tightened three-source verification, reduced dissolution exposition. Added urgency cue (binding headache) and bridged analytical audit to decision with 'capacity was enough' line.

MAJOR: Compressed repetitive doubt-cycling in middle section (-371 words). Removed weakest Lirien-who clause, tightened Oathbrand/Calwrath memory loops. Punched up vorakh fight verbs. Addressed back-to-back internality concern with Ch18.

MAJOR: Compressed archive procedural section ~25% (-339 words). Cut shelving logistics, charcoal tradecraft explanation, decade-by-decade methodology. Kept all conspiracy evidence and discovery beats.

MAJOR: Cut ~250 words of redundant interiority from Scene 3. Five restatements of 'I am compromised / I am wanting' removed. Advanced emotion from recognizing want (Scene 2) to wanting to know someone (Scene 3).
MAJOR: Cut fourth repetition of binding timeline numbers (48/72/96/120). Compressed travel logistics (~200 words). Added unframed romance crack before classification reasserts.

MAJOR: Cut Tavik-through-garrison observation (~100 words, reader saw in Ch1). Replaced specific Pallor metrics with pattern language. Fixed emotional distance with water metaphor replacing clinical cluster.

MAJOR: Trimmed ~255 words of climax padding — redundant partnership description, doubled surgeon metaphors, repeated documentary-evidence reference. Gives both seal-work and trial sequences more breathing room.
Tightened evidence cross-referencing scene ~15% (-221 words). Consolidated testimony names, shortened cross-referencing description, streamlined recognition beat.
